testcase.name: setGraduationYearConditionsUnmetTest
testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: setGraduationYear() should not allow new student to immediately graduate. Expected: a String matching the pattern: "?Check\s+(the\s+)?amount\s+of\s+required\s+credit [.!"]* but: was: Check the required studies (<== see Console output for more context)
Regular expression explanation: ? : Element to the left is optional (e.g. colou?r) \s : Match any whitespace character [ \t\n\x0B\f\r] + : Element to the left can occur one or more times ( : Start group (a "capturing group") ) : End capturing group [ : Start character class (e.g. [abc]) . : Match any character, literal '.' inside character class ] : End character class (e.g. [^A-Z]) * : Element to the left can occur zero or more times at dev.m3s.programming2.homework2.GraduationTests.setGraduationYearConditionsUnmetTest(GraduationTests.java:194)
testcase.system-out: Calling new Student( ) Calling setGraduationYear( 2025 ) Verifying that "Check the required studies" matches the expected pattern ""?Check\s+(the\s+)?amount\s+of\s+required\s+credits[.!"]*"
